title: ライスシャワーからの提案

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We've been gathering members, and the team is
really starting to take shape. One day...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I notice Rice Shower looking at me as if she wants
to say something.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Well... I thought of something this morning...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Rice Shower runs out of my office before I can
stop her.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I, um, came up with a name for our team. I
thought it might be poetic to compare ourselves
to a blossoming flower, so, um...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I was thinking we could call ourselves "Blue
Bloom." What do you think?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That might be a good team name! I'll have to
make note of it.
